stemHtml: Which of these statements concerning oxygen on board of passenger transport aeroplanes is correct?

options.a: Since lavatories are not fitted with an oxygen system, they should be evacuated quickly in case of decompression.
options.b: After being activated a chemical oxygen generator does not produce any heat.
options.c: A chemical oxygen generator is able to provide oxygen for at least one hour.
options.d: Portable oxygen bottles in the cabin are primarily intended for first aid purposes.
